title: Aetheria Landscapes
description: An award-winning ultra-wide landscape documentation series tracking shadows and alpine architecture across the Swiss Alps in high-contrast monochrome.

title: Minimalist Street Shadows
description: Unveiling geometries in daily city environments. A visual story about harsh sunlight, high contrasts, and lone subjects traversing urban landscapes.

title: Golden Hour Portraits
description: Exploring soft natural flares, ambient backlighting, and the delicate warmth of sunset hour portraits taken with vintage prime lenses.

title: The Neon Nocturnes
description: A cinematic nocturnal study capturing urban rain reflections, cybernetic teal and violet color palettes, and low-light environmental details.
